title: fagelia saxatilis
intro: Fagelia saxatilis, also known as the Saxatilis fagelia or Fagelia, is a plant species that is native to Australia and is part of the family Rutaceae. The medicinal properties of Fagelia saxatilis include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Fagelia saxatilis include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. Fagelia saxatilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and it is often used in traditional Aboriginal Australian medicine.
